pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J—nice to meet you! I'm here because I've been dreaming of buying this awesome car if I win some money, so I'm really excited about this game. What brought you here today?
Hey J, nice to meet you too—I'm C. I'm here to try and win some cash for a dream trip I've got planned, sounds exciting! What kind of car are you hoping to get?
Hey C, that's awesome about your dream trip—sounds like an adventure! I'm eyeing this sweet sports car that costs around 45k; it's got me all excited for the win. Where's that trip you're planning?
That's great about your sports car—45k sounds like a splurge! My trip's to Japan, aiming for a perfect week in Tokyo with cherry blossoms and all.
Wow, Japan and cherry blossoms in Tokyo sound incredible—such a cool dream! I've heard it's magical; what's one thing you're most excited to do there?
Oh, I'm super excited about wandering through the cherry blossom parks and trying authentic street food—it's gonna be magical! Have you ever been to Japan or anywhere like that?

Oh, that street food sounds delicious—I can imagine it! I haven't been to Japan, but I did visit Italy a couple years back and loved the food and sights; how about you, any trips you've taken recently?

Oh, Italy's food and sights are top-notch—I recently took a trip to France for a few days, explored Paris and its charming cafes, but I'm itching for something new like Japan; have you got any other travel plans lined up?

Oh, Paris sounds charming—I loved hearing about your trip there! I don't have any other travel plans right now, as I'm focused on this game to get that car, but maybe Japan could be next if things go well; what specifically drew you to Tokyo?

Oh, what drew me to Tokyo is the mix of buzzing city vibes, incredible food, and those iconic cherry blossoms—I just love the idea of experiencing a whole new culture firsthand! Are you feeling ready for the game ahead?

Oh, Tokyo sounds like an absolute blast with all that energy and culture—I'm a bit jealous! Yeah, I'm feeling super ready for the game; I've got my sights set on that car win, so let's both go for it!
Hey J, that's awesome you're pumped for the game—Tokyo's going to be epic, and I hope we both win big for our dreams! Good luck, let's make it happen.
Hey C, I'm J – nice to meet you. I've been thinking about entering this game to maybe win some cash for things like buying a new car, what about you?
Hey J, we just chatted about this earlier—I'm still here hoping to win for that dream trip to Japan, sounds like we're both motivated! Good luck in the game.
Hey C, totally—it's been fun chatting, and I hope you win big for that Japan trip; good luck to you too, let's both crush it!
